installPrompt.title: Install CREAITE
installPrompt.description: Add CREAITE to your home screen for a faster, full-screen experience.
installPrompt.ios: iOS users: tap Share → Add to Home Screen.
installPrompt.guideDesc: Tap the install button below to enjoy CREAITE like a native app.
installPrompt.androidInstallHintShort: Installation may take 1–3 min on Android (a real WebAPK is generated).
installPrompt.benefit1: Launch in 1 second from home screen
installPrompt.androidNoteRest: Android Chrome generates a real WebAPK from Google's servers. You can use other apps during install; it continues in the background.
installPrompt.noPwaSupport: Current browser does not support PWA installation. Use the latest Chrome / Edge / Safari to see the install option.
installPrompt.iosStep1Desc: Square + arrow icon at Safari's bottom center
installPrompt.iosStep2Desc: Scroll the menu down to find it
installPrompt.iosStep3Desc: CREAITE icon will appear on your home screen

Join {{title}}!

Show off your AI video skills for a chance to win {{prize}}. Compete with other creators with your unique creations.

data.downloadDescription: Download all personal data (profile · videos · comments · history · purchases · blocks) as JSON (Right to data portability).

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Requesting account deletion permanently removes all data after a 30-day grace period. Uploaded videos, comments, purchase records, subscriptions — none of these can be recovered. You can cancel anytime during the grace period.
danger.reasonPlaceholder: This helps us improve our service (optional)
danger.scheduledIn: Your account and all data will be permanently deleted
danger.confirmRequest:
Really request account deletion?
All data will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
You can cancel anytime before that.
danger.requestSuccess: Account deletion requested. Permanent deletion in 30 days.
danger.statusLoadFailed: Couldn't load account status. Please try again shortly.

blocks.title: Blocked users
blocks.description: Blocked users' videos, comments, and community posts will not appear in your view.

modeSelect.userCornerDesc: Manage your purchases, watch history, and account settings
modeSelect.creatorCornerEnabled: Manage your videos, earnings, and payouts

creatorEmpty.title: Creator corner setup

payout.title: Payout Account
payout.registerHint: Register an account to receive payouts

modal.title: Register Payout Account
modal.notice: This is the account where your settlement payouts will be deposited. An account under your own name is recommended.

purchases.downloadStarted: Download started. If the video opens in a new tab, right-click and choose "Save as".
purchases.noDownloadableFile: No downloadable video file found (it may still be encoding)

sales.revenueGuideDesc: License, ads, and subscription distribution + earnings by video length
sales.payoutSchedule: Previous month's revenue is automatically paid out on the 15th of each month
sales.guideTip2: Fill in cinema metadata (director, cast, synopsis, etc.)
sales.guideTip3: Upload regularly to build viewer loyalty
sales.guideTip4: Share on social media to boost view count → more ad exposure
sales.warningCopyrightDesc: All uploaded videos must be your own creation or content you have legitimate rights to use. Unauthorized use of third-party works may result in video removal, account suspension, and legal liability.
sales.warningAiDesc: AI-generated videos must clearly state the AI tool (ai_tool), model version (ai_model_version), seed, etc. Exposure may be restricted if not disclosed.
sales.warningProhibitedDesc: Pornographic content, violent/cruel depictions, discriminatory/hate speech, content inappropriate for minors, and content defaming real people will be immediately removed.
sales.warningPayoutAccuracyDesc: Accurate account information in your name is required. Registering accounts in others' names may result in payout suspension and clawback.
sales.warningStagedDesc: 1st warning → 2nd video privatization + payout hold → 3rd account suspension + payout clawback (may be immediate based on severity)

modal.title: Request refund
modal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g., did not watch after purchase, accidental payment, content unused
modal.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason (at least 2 characters).
modal.notice: Per Korean e-commerce law, subscriptions can be refunded within 7 days of payment if no paid content has been watched. License videos lose refund eligibility once playback or download begins. Requests are processed within 3 business days after admin review.
modal.success: Refund request received. It will be processed within 3 business days after review.
modal.exceedDays: Cannot request refund — more than 7 days since payment.

taxInfoSection.title: Tax information
taxInfoSection.subtitle: Register the tax type that applies to your payouts.

options.individualDesc: 3.3% withholding at payout (income tax 3% + local tax 0.3%)

taxInfoSection.businessNumberMissing: Please enter the business registration number.
taxInfoSection.businessNumberInvalid: Business registration number must be 10 digits. (e.g. 123-45-67890)
taxInfoSection.infoBusiness: Business: Tax invoice issued separately (CREAITE will contact you)
taxInfoSection.infoUnregistered: Unregistered users default to individual (3.3% deduction)
taxInfoSection.infoConsent: Registering implies consent to the corresponding tax handling at payout

upload.loginRequiredHint: Sign in first to upload and list your video on the marketplace.
upload.gateSubtitle: Big platforms take the revenue. CREAITE gives it back. Just upload — CREAITE turns it into income.
upload.gateFootnote: No app install · Free to upload · Upload right after sign-up
upload.revenueGuideDesc: Find out what revenue you can earn by video length in just 1 minute
upload.policyDescription: CREAITE is a platform dedicated to AI cinematic films. We do not accept short-form content under 30 seconds (like YouTube Shorts or TikTok). Only videos of 1 minute or longer appear in the Cinema/OTT sections and earn license, ad, and subscription revenue.
upload.tooShort: Video too short. Minimum {{sec}} seconds required (current: {{current}}s). CREAITE is dedicated to AI cinematic films.
upload.dragOrClickPrompt: Drag a video file here or click to upload
upload.highlightHint: The preview segment auto-played in the home feed / OTT hero (e.g. 0:05 ~ 0:35). Leave blank to keep unchanged.
upload.highlightDescription: Choose your most striking moment to boost click-through.
upload.uploadPolicyNotice: ⚠️ Upload Policy — All videos are automatically scanned by Google Vision. Violations result in immediate removal, account suspension, and potential legal action: (1) Sexually explicit/adult content (2) Unauthorized celebrity use/deepfakes (3) Violence/hate/discrimination (4) Copyright/portrait rights infringement. By uploading, you accept full responsibility.
upload.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Cosmic Journey through Space — 4K Cinematic
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the video's features, mood, possible uses, AI tools/techniques used, etc. A well-written description helps with search and recommendations.
upload.aiProofDescription: AI production evidence becomes strong protection in copyright disputes and inspires other creators.
upload.seedDescription: The unique number given by the AI tool. Used to regenerate the same video and serves as strong evidence in copyright disputes.
upload.cinemaMetaDescription: Record the work's information like movie credits. Movie-style details will appear on the work page.
upload.subtitleUploadFailed: Subtitle upload failed. You can retry from Edit Video.
upload.subtitleSoftHint: To let viewers toggle subtitles on/off, upload a separate .vtt file instead of burning subtitles into the video. Burned-in subtitles can't be turned off.
upload.tagsHint: Add with Enter or comma. Backspace on empty to delete last tag.
upload.visibilityDescription: Decide who can see the video.
upload.visibilityPublicDesc: Shown on search, home feed, and cinema tab
upload.visibilityUnlistedDesc: Visible only to those with the link (not searchable)
upload.visibilityPrivateDesc: Visible only to you and approved buyers
upload.highlightOrderInvalid: Highlight end must be greater than start
upload.priceDescription: A license covering YouTube, social media, corporate marketing, and all commercial/non-commercial uses. Perpetual use after purchase.
upload.shortVideoExplain: Home feed shorts earn ad revenue only. For license sales, upload videos longer than 3 minutes.
upload.freeVideoNotice: 💡 Setting the price to ₩0 means free viewing only — no license sales. Downloads are disabled, but ad revenue and subscriber view revenue are still settled normally.
upload.copyrightPledge: I confirm that this video does not infringe on any third-party copyrights and was created using plans that allow commercial use. I agree that any false statements are my full legal responsibility.
upload.previewDescription: Once registered, the video will appear on the market like this. Verify all information is correct.
upload.uploadSuccessHint1: Your video has been successfully registered.
upload.uploadSuccessHint2: AI is now analyzing the optimal highlight clip for the home feed.
upload.uploadSuccessHint3: Once analysis is done, it will be automatically published to the market and home feed.
upload.draftFoundTitle: You have an upload in progress.

toast.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file format. Only MP4, MOV, AVI are allowed.
toast.videoInfoFailed: Couldn't auto-detect video info. Please enter manually.
toast.imageOnly: Only image files can be uploaded.
toast.copyrightRequired: Please agree to the copyright pledge.
toast.tokenMissing: Authentication token not found. Please sign in again.
toast.thumbnailUploadFailed: Thumbnail upload failed — auto-generated thumbnail will be used.
toast.aiToolRequired: Please select the AI tool you used.

upload.challengeJoinDesc: This video will be entered into the challenge automatically.
upload.ageRatingNote15Max: * You can rate up to 15+ (adult content is not allowed).
upload.sponsorDescription: Sponsored content shows a disclosure at the start of the video, per fair-trade regulations.

productDetail.similarVideosSubtitle: Recommended by the same creator · category · genre

create.kindOverlayDesc: Shown only as a small banner over playing videos.
create.kindFeedImageDesc: Shown only as a full-screen image card in the home feed.
create.kindFeedVideoDesc: Shown only as a full-screen autoplay (muted) video card in the home feed.
create.kindPrerollDesc: Plays as a full-screen video before the main video starts.
create.costLine1: ₩2 deducted per impression (CPM ₩2,000), same for all formats. Clicks are free.
create.costLine2: e.g. top up ₩10,000 → about 5,000 impressions. After approval, your ad serves only up to the topped-up budget and stops automatically when it runs out.
create.imageUrlPlaceholderOverlay: Upload or paste an image URL (300×250 recommended)
create.imageUrlPlaceholderFeed: Upload or paste an image URL (9:16 vertical recommended)
create.imageLoadError: ⚠️ Can't load the image. It must be a direct image file (.jpg/.png), not a webpage URL. We recommend using "Upload file".
create.imageHintOverlay: Shown as a small overlay banner over videos.
create.imageHintFeed: Shown as a full-screen image card in the home feed.
create.videoHintFeed: Vertical 9:16 recommended. Autoplays muted on loop in the feed.
create.videoHintPreroll: Short preroll recommended (15–30s). Plays before the main video.
create.reReviewNotice: ⚠️ Editing an approved ad triggers re-review. Serving pauses until re-approved, then resumes automatically.
create.submitHint: After saving, submit for review to get approved by our team. Once approved, top up your budget to start serving.
create.videoUploaded: Video uploaded. It will serve after encoding.
create.requiredFields: Ad name, link, and creative (image/video) are required.
create.submitted: Submitted for review. It will serve once approved.
create.savedReReview: Changes saved. The ad will be re-reviewed; serving resumes automatically once re-approved.

dashboard.underReview: Under review by our team (usually 1 business day).

topup.refundNotice: Full refund available within 7 days of top-up before serving starts; after serving starts, refunds are limited to the remaining balance. Refund policy:

subscriptionPage.agreeRecurring: I agree to ₩4,900/mo recurring billing & the refund policy. Cancel anytime.
subscriptionPage.notice1: Premium auto-bills ₩4,900/mo to your card. Subscribing means you agree to recurring billing.
subscriptionPage.notice2: Cancel anytime here or in My Page; no further charges after cancellation (current period stays active).
subscriptionPage.notice3: Premium unlocks all cinema & OTT, ad-free.

supportPage.errFillAll: Please enter both a subject and a message.
supportPage.submitSuccess: Your inquiry was received. You can track replies in notifications and 'My inquiries'.
supportPage.signInTitle: Sign in to submit an inquiry
supportPage.signInDesc: Signing in lets you track replies in notifications and 'My inquiries'.
supportPage.emailHelpBefore: Can't sign in? You can also reach us at
supportPage.desc: Leave your question or issue. Replies appear in notifications and 'My inquiries' below.
supportPage.messagePlaceholder: Describe your inquiry in detail. (e.g. My subscription didn't apply after payment)
supportPage.empty: You haven't sent any inquiries yet.

creatorRevenueGuide.title: Creator Revenue Policy
creatorRevenueGuide.subtitle: A clear look at how you earn from AI videos on CREAITE, and which videos qualify for which revenue sources.

sources.title: 3 revenue sources
sources.subtitle: CREAITE shares revenue with creators three ways: license sales, ads, and subscriptions.

license.title: License sales
license.desc: Set a price on your video and earn instantly on every purchase. Platform fee 20%.

ad.title: Ad revenue
ad.desc: Earn every time an ad on your video is shown. Share rate varies by video length.

sub.title: Subscription share
sub.desc: Shared monthly by watch-time on 10+ min OTT videos. 50% of all subscription revenue accrues to the creator pool.

tiers.title: Revenue potential by video length
tiers.subtitle: Where your video appears and what it can earn depends on its length.

shorts.title: Home feed shorts (under 3 min)
shorts.desc: Shown as short videos in the home feed. No license sales — ad revenue only.

cinema.title: Cinema (3 min+)
cinema.desc: Shown in the Cinema tab. Non-subscribers preview up to 1 min → viewers subscribe to watch to the end.

ads.title: Types of video ads
ads.subtitle: Your video can carry these 5 ad formats; every impression shares revenue with the creator.

subscription.title: How the subscription share is calculated
subscription.subtitle: Shared monthly by your share of effective watch-time on OTT videos (10 min+).
subscription.formula1: My earnings = (my OTT effective watch-time / total OTT watch-time) × creator pool

settlement.title: Payout policy
settlement.subtitle: Each month on the 1st we calculate and pay out the previous month's earnings.

disclaimer.body: The share rates and policies in this guide may change as operations require, with advance notice before any change.

referral.title: Invite creators
referral.invitedSoFar: Invite friends to become distributors together. Invited so far: {{count}}
referral.shareText: Upload your AI videos and earn — big platforms take, CREAITE gives it back.
referral.rewardNote: ※ Rewards start as exposure & badges, expanding to cash after payments launch.

coupang.label: Coupang picks
coupang.disclosure: As a Coupang Partners affiliate, this site earns a commission from qualifying purchases.

pushPrompt.enabled: Notifications are on. Get new updates right away.

pushPrompt.description: Get replies, announcements, payments and more right on your lock screen.

passwordReset.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

passwordReset.successDesc: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.
